title: BGE Reranker
author: OrcVole
tagline: Self-hosted reranking API (BAAI bge-reranker-v2-m3 on HuggingFace TEI)

apikey.message: Get your API key: open a Terminal for this app (the `>_` button) and run `cat /app/data/.secrets/keys.env`. Send it as `Authorization: Bearer <key>` to `POST /rerank`.

api.message: This is a reranking API, not a web app. Opening the app's domain shows a short landing page explaining what it is and how to call it; the interactive Swagger docs are at `/docs` (behind login). Call `POST /rerank` with a `query` and a list of `texts` (it returns a relevance score for each). The model `BAAI/bge-reranker-v2-m3` is baked in, so the app is healthy within seconds and serves reranking after a brief warmup (under a minute).
